title: File:NCLEncoreJuneau.jpg
description: Norwegian Encore approaching Juneau, Alaska on July 5 2022 — full broadside profile showing the vibrant colored hull livery and 'NORWEGIAN ENCORE' nameplate, with the snow-capped Coast Mountains of southeast Alaska in the background and calm Inside Passage water beneath.
via: curl from upload.wikimedia.org (SHA1 computed locally; Wikimedia did not publish it)

visual_verification.method: Manual Read-tool inspection of the .webp by Claude (operator-supervised), 2026-05-27
visual_verification.note: Full broadside of Norwegian Encore with name + colorful hull livery clearly visible against snowy Alaska mountains, dense evergreen forest, calm water. Identity unambiguous. The strongest hero candidate of the new image set.
